title: Operation Portugal 2 - La vie de chateau
original_title: Opération Portugal 2 : La Vie de château
overview: Hakim has to foil the plans of a shady developer : the count of Neuville. Helped by his friends, he seeps into the count's castle, but he also has to prepare his wedding with Julia.
